title: Five truths, the rest are lies

boxes.text: You have already met two different Horsemen and the real Arvegum beast.
Herb has a secret third personality like fuckass Moon Knight.
Watanabe is still alive.
Anubis killing Gorta was the right thing in Hindsight because she was eating the townsfolk and blamed the Beast.
An important NPC will be introduced later, named Shmorby.
Baylis died because you took too long.
Glint is real, and they are coming to kill you.
Gimic will kill an important NPC if you do not stop him now.
Blobert died in the Obsidian Crystalis and was replaced with a doppelganger.
The inspiration for an NPC you've met is genuinely Lola Bunny.
The Gods all died, and Aurelia is responsible.
Rusty is an undercover agent for a secret organization.
Pouboo is cracked at Fortnite.
L will beat Rusty in a fight and literally rip his metal arm off.
Skrapp and Soko have a child
Damien is an actual demon that replaced the real Damien long ago and killed him.
Aurelia will be the Death Horsemen.
Ze Beast is going through a Fight Club-esque situation.
If Peggle becomes a druid, he will slowly start dying.
Demons are the lost souls of people trying to make it to Edelith, and you are monsters for killing them.
Korg has a backup installed in a Steelside Legion server.
Mousse is alive (Somehow) and Plotting Revenge.
Mr. V is still alive.
Tinka isn't a warforged but another creature in a mech suit.
Vaskel is coming to kill Broomhilda still, the other stuff was a misdirection.
